name: Vortex Spiral Galaxy
description: You have been assigned the Vortex Spiral Galaxy — a grand design spiral of deep indigo, teal, and charcoal. Its defined, sweeping arms are vast rivers of cold cosmic gas and luminous star-forming nebulae, twisting outward in a hypnotic vortex that pulls all light toward its ancient core.

attributes.value: Twisting arms of cold gas and bright star-forming nebulae
